problem_solved: EMS and public safety agencies lack real-time visibility into operational data, making it difficult to monitor performance, detect emerging threats, and improve situational awareness across CAD, ePCR, and hospital systems
solution_description: Real-time data analytics and monitoring platform that aggregates CAD, ePCR, ProQA, RMS, and hospital ED data into unified dashboards with automated alerts, early event detection for epidemics/bioterrorism, and performance analytics for 911, EMS, Fire, and Law Enforcement
notes: Deep integration with existing EMS systems. Real-time dashboards for hospital status, demand analysis, and resource planning. Strong fit for EMS system performance monitoring and early warning detection.
